content:
## MARKET OVERVIEW

1. What is the Current Market Regime?
RISK-ON environment: Volatility normal at 35.3% and breadth strong with 6/8 sectors positive.

2. Which sectors are leading?
Banking & Finance ABOVE TREND: YKBNK (1W: +13.39% | 1M: +1.76%), AKBNK (1W: +12.56% | 1M: +1.47%), GARAN (1W: +8.72% | 1M: +3.35%). Construction & REIT ABOVE TREND: ALARK (1W: +8.63% | 1M: +6.57%).

3. Which sectors are lagging?
Energy & Chemicals BELOW TREND: PETKM (1W: -6.96% | 1M: -26.89%), TUPRS (1W: -2.91% | 1M: -6.76%). Technology & Telecom BELOW TREND: KONTR (1W: -15.81% | 1M: -34.87%).

## STOCK PERFORMANCE

4. Top Performing Stocks?
YKBNK (1W: +13.39% | 1M: +1.76%) ABOVE TREND; AKBNK (1W: +12.56% | 1M: +1.47%) ABOVE TREND; GARAN (1W: +8.72% | 1M: +3.35%) ABOVE TREND; ALARK (1W: +8.63% | 1M: +6.57%) ABOVE TREND; ISCTR (1W: +8.49% | 1M: +1.42%) ABOVE TREND.

5. Worst Performing Stocks?
KONTR (1W: -15.81% | 1M: -34.87%) BELOW TREND; PETKM (1W: -6.96% | 1M: -26.89%) BELOW TREND; HEKTS (1W: -6.04% | 1M: -15.07%) BELOW TREND; TRMET (1W: -5.59% | 1M: -15.82%) BELOW TREND; VESTL (1W: -4.23% | 1M: -15.83%) BELOW TREND.

6. Momentum Stocks?
Upside momentum: YKBNK (1W: +13.39% | 1M: +1.76%) ABOVE TREND, AKBNK (1W: +12.56% | 1M: +1.47%) ABOVE TREND, ISCTR (1W: +8.49% | 1M: +1.42%) ABOVE TREND. Downside momentum: KONTR (1W: -15.81% | 1M: -34.87%) BELOW TREND, PETKM (1W: -6.96% | 1M: -26.89%) BELOW TREND.

## SECTOR OUTLOOK

7. Banking Sector Outlook?
Banking is the clear leader; AKBNK (1W: +12.56% | 1M: +1.47%) ABOVE TREND, YKBNK (1W: +13.39% | 1M: +1.76%) ABOVE TREND, GARAN (1W: +8.72% | 1M: +3.35%) ABOVE TREND, ISCTR (1W: +8.49% | 1M: +1.42%) ABOVE TREND — trade overweight on strength and momentum.

8. Industrial Sector Outlook?
Heavy/auto mixed: EREGL (1W: +0.51% | 1M: -1.49%) RECOVERY, FROTO (1W: +0.58% | 1M: -7.22%) RECOVERY, TOASO (1W: +0.51% | 1M: -1.83%) RECOVERY, ASELS (1W: +2.27% | 1M: -10.05%) RECOVERY — look for earnings/capex catalysts.

9. Energy & Chemicals Outlook?
Energy remains weak and defensive: TUPRS (1W: -2.91% | 1M: -6.76%) BELOW TREND, PETKM (1W: -6.96% | 1M: -26.89%) BELOW TREND, SASA (1W: +4.42% | 1M: -10.65%) RECOVERY — be selective, avoid broad exposure.

## PORTFOLIO STRATEGY

10. Portfolio Recommendation?
Risk-ON calls for overweight Banks and select Construction/REIT (AKBNK, YKBNK, ALARK) and underweight Energy & weak Tech names (PETKM, KONTR); trim holdings that are BELOW TREND and reallocate to momentum winners.

## NEXT WEEK OUTLOOK

11. Stocks to Watch Next Week?
AKBNK (1W: +12.56% | 1M: +1.47%) ABOVE TREND; YKBNK (1W: +13.39% | 1M: +1.76%) ABOVE TREND; ALARK (1W: +8.63% | 1M: +6.57%) ABOVE TREND; SASA (1W: +4.42% | 1M: -10.65%) RECOVERY; KONTR (1W: -15.81% | 1M: -34.87%) BELOW TREND.

12. Sectors to Watch Next Week?
Banking & Finance for continued leadership and flows, Construction & REIT for breakout follow-through, and Energy & Chemicals for downside risk and mean-reversion signals.

13. Key Levels & Triggers?
Watch XU100 reaction to its recent 1-month high/low for regime confirmation; a sustained break higher with breadth expansion confirms RISK-ON continuation, while reversal with rising volatility would flip to caution; monitor macro headlines, FX moves and bank earnings as primary triggers.

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
Risk‑on market with normal volatility (35.3%) and broad participation (6/8 sectors positive); banks lead the rally while energy and select tech names lag. Tactical overweight in banks and select construction names, stay light on energy and deeply lagging technology stocks given downside momentum.
